changelog: 0.4.1 Browser Tool fully decoupled—standalone module with smarter DOM extraction, reduced system coupling, enhanced stability. Bluetooth Protocol Stack Extension in Mod Store: low-level Hook framework, chip identification, scanner quirks, GATT fixes for MTK/Qualcomm. Security vulnerabilities patched. Mod Store UI polished. Hand-drawn Digital Clock screensaver—pure canvas rendering, zero WebView, floating window mode, HA sync, double-tap toggle. Path: Extensions → Info & Scenes → Minimalist Clock. Bluetooth watchdog fixed, log cache cleaned #57. Auto-cleanup for duplicate BT devices. Settings button restored. Automation issues addressed.
